testcase.name: SPRIN Login Tests › should display login page correctly
SPRIN Login Tests › should show error with invalid credentials
SPRIN Login Tests › should login successfully with valid credentials
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › login.spec.js:40:3 › SPRIN Login Tests › should login successfully with valid credentials
Error: expect(page).toHaveURL(expected) failed
Expected pattern: /main\.php/ Received string: "http://localhost/sprint/login.php" Timeout: 10000ms
Call log: - Expect "toHaveURL" with timeout 10000ms 13 × unexpected value "http://localhost/sprint/login.php"
43 | await page.click('button[type="submit"]'); 44 | > 45 | await expect(page).toHaveURL(/main\.php/, { timeout: 10000 }); | ^ 46 | await expect(page.locator('body')).toContainText('Dashboard'); 47 | }); 48 | at /opt/lampp/htdocs/sprint/tests/playwright/login.spec.js:45:24
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../../test-results/login-SPRIN-Login-Tests-sh-bd3a7-ully-with-valid-credentials-chromium/test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
attachment #2: video (video/webm) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../../test-results/login-SPRIN-Login-Tests-sh-bd3a7-ully-with-valid-credentials-chromium/video.webm ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

Error: expect(page).toHaveURL(expected) failed
Expected pattern: /main\.php/ Received string: "http://localhost/sprint/login.php" Timeout: 10000ms
Call log: - Expect "toHaveURL" with timeout 10000ms 13 × unexpected value "http://localhost/sprint/login.php"
43 | await page.click('button[type="submit"]'); 44 | > 45 | await expect(page).toHaveURL(/main\.php/, { timeout: 10000 }); | ^ 46 | await expect(page.locator('body')).toContainText('Dashboard'); 47 | }); 48 | at /opt/lampp/htdocs/sprint/tests/playwright/login.spec.js:45:24
attachment #1: screenshot (image/png) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── ../../test-results/login-SPRIN-Login-Tests-sh-bd3a7-ully-with-valid-credentials-chromium-retry1/test-failed-1.png ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

testcase.name: SPRIN Login Tests › should work with Quick Login feature
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › login.spec.js:49:3 › SPRIN Login Tests › should work with Quick Login feature ───────
Error: expect(page).toHaveURL(expected) failed
Expected pattern: /main\.php/ Received string: "http://localhost/sprint/login.php" Timeout: 10000ms
Call log: - Expect "toHaveURL" with timeout 10000ms 14 × unexpected value "http://localhost/sprint/login.php"
54 | if (await quickLoginButton.isVisible()) { 55 | await quickLoginButton.click(); > 56 | await expect(page).toHaveURL(/main\.php/, { timeout: 10000 }); | ^ 57 | await expect(page.locator('body')).toContainText('Dashboard'); 58 | } else { 59 | } at /opt/lampp/htdocs/sprint/tests/playwright/login.spec.js:56:26

testcase.name: SPRIN Login Tests › should redirect to login when accessing protected pages without auth
testcase.error:
[chromium] › login.spec.js:62:3 › SPRIN Login Tests › should redirect to login when accessing protected pages without auth
Error: page.goto: net::ERR_HTTP_RESPONSE_CODE_FAILURE at http://localhost/sprint/pages/personil.php Call log: - navigating to "http://localhost/sprint/pages/personil.php", waiting until "load"
72 | 73 | for (const pageUrl of protectedPages) { > 74 | await page.goto(pageUrl); | ^ 75 | await page.waitForTimeout(2000); 76 | 77 | const currentUrl = page.url(); at /opt/lampp/htdocs/sprint/tests/playwright/login.spec.js:74:18

testcase.name: SPRIN Login Tests › should maintain session after login
testcase.failure:
[chromium] › login.spec.js:85:3 › SPRIN Login Tests › should maintain session after login ────────
Error: expect(page).toHaveURL(expected) failed
Expected pattern: /main\.php/ Received string: "http://localhost/sprint/login.php" Timeout: 5000ms
Call log: - Expect "toHaveURL" with timeout 5000ms 9 × unexpected value "http://localhost/sprint/login.php"
89 | await page.click('button[type="submit"]'); 90 | > 91 | await expect(page).toHaveURL(/main\.php/); | ^ 92 | 93 | await page.goto(urlHelper.getPersonilUrl()); 94 | await page.waitForTimeout(2000); at /opt/lampp/htdocs/sprint/tests/playwright/login.spec.js:91:24
